pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 40-44 search for and create product with exact name 'Office Chair' via Odoo XML-RPC API

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 16 generates JPEG image at exact path using ImageMagick convert command. Image dimensions 800x600, background #E0E0E0, text content includes Office Chair label and date
Code analysis: verifier.py line 67 defines expected_note; line 69 performs case-insensitive substring match checking for exact string
Code analysis: verifier.py line 51 checks if quality_state field equals 'pass' (corresponding to Passed status in quality.check Selection field defined in quality_check.py line 13-17)

privileged_info_summary: Task perform_picture_check@1 is an Odoo 17 quality management task involving product 'Office Chair' with credentials admin/admin at localhost:8069. Evidence file is synthetically generated as an 800x600 JPEG at /home/ga/Documents/chair_proof.jpg using ImageMagick. Required note is 'Visual verification complete' and required status is 'pass'. Setup creates quality control point via Odoo XML-RPC with test_type='picture'. The quality.check model includes quality_state field (Selection: none/pass/fail), product_id, team_id, note (Html), and other metadata fields. Verifier awards 40pts for pass status, 40pts for picture upload (checks picture_size>0), 10pts for correct note content, 10pts for record modification timestamp.
